name: Apple Health Data Analyzer
author: Keith Rumjahn
description: Parser and AI analyzer for Apple Health export.xml files.

schemaMapping.workout_data.csv: Flattened workout history with durations and calories
schemaMapping.smart_ring_metrics_data.csv: Timestamp-level smart ring metrics including HRV, respiratory rate, oxygen saturation, resting heart rate, heart rate, and sleep stages
schemaMapping.smart_ring_daily_summary.csv: Daily aggregate smart ring metrics for recovery and readiness analysis
schemaMapping.smart_ring_weekly_summary.csv: Weekly rollup of smart ring metrics to reveal trend-level changes
schemaMapping.smart_ring_hrv_trends.png: HRV trend visualization for smart ring recovery signals
schemaMapping.smart_ring_respiratory_rate_trends.png: Respiratory rate trend visualization for recovery and strain changes
schemaMapping.smart_ring_oxygen_saturation_trends.png: Blood oxygen saturation trend visualization for nightly and baseline checks
schemaMapping.smart_ring_sleep_stage_distribution.png: Sleep stage distribution visualization derived from Apple Health sleep analysis records
schemaMapping.smart_ring_resting_heart_rate_trends.png: Resting heart rate trend visualization for readiness and stress baselines

aiAgentGuidance.usage: Use the --export flag to point to the local export.xml. Processed CSVs are stored in ./health_out/ by default. Use these CSVs for statistical analysis and health recommendations.
